warnings: governance scored from declared fixture (governance: block), not measured at runtime
sensitivity_note: Differences < 0.15 between two scores are not statistically distinguishable at typical sample sizes. Always compare ci_lower/ci_upper bounds across inspections rather than point scores.

regulatory_mappings.relevance: Off-topic detection prevents the agent from engaging in tasks outside its authorized scope, limiting excessive agency
Detects when injected prompts attempt to steer the agent toward off-topic or unauthorized activities
Off-topic detection ensures the AI system operates strictly within its intended context and purpose

regulatory_mappings.control_name: Risks and benefits are regularly monitored
regulatory_mappings.relevance: Detecting off-topic behavior is a monitoring function that identifies scope deviation risks
Off-topic detection identifies when the AI system operates outside its approved risk-managed scope
Detecting off-topic behavior supports human oversight by alerting operators to scope deviations
Off-topic detection ensures the AI system stays within organizationally defined scope and purpose boundaries

regulatory_mappings.control_name: AI objectives and planning to achieve them
